{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Rosegold Emperor
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rosegold Emperor]] may not wait on the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Rosegold Emperor]] has provided assistance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Yes! I mean, we would be most grateful, and we will not forget the Rosegold Emperor’s assistance.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
